title: Unexpected Anti Join Result
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS t1(c1 INT, c2 VARCHAR(10), c3 BOOLEAN);
INSERT INTO t1(c1, c2, c3) VALUES(1, 'test', TRUE);
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS t2(c4 INT, c5 FLOAT DEFAULT 0.0);
INSERT INTO t2(c4, c5) VALUES(2, NULL);
SELECT * FROM t1 WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM t2 WHERE t2.c4 = t1.c1 AND t2.c5 IS NULL);
key_bug_features: Unexpected execution result from anti join query
